password.label: Password
password.hint: At least 15 characters including uppercase, lowercase, a number and a special character.

password.min: Password must be at least 15 characters
password.uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.number: Must contain at least one number
password.special: Must contain at least one special character
password.hint: At least 15 characters including uppercase, lowercase, a number and a special character.

registration.title: Registration not possible
registration.message: The registration could not be completed. Please check your inputs or try again later.

login.title: Login not possible
login.message: Sign in failed. Please check your input. If an account exists, you may need to verify your email or request a new verification link.

resetPasswordRequest.title: Reset link request not possible
resetPasswordRequest.message: The reset link could not be requested right now. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Password reset not possible
resetPassword.message: Your password could not be reset. The link may be invalid or expired. Please request a new reset link and try again.

logout.title: Logout failed
logout.message: You could not be signed out. Please try again later.

delete.title: Account deletion failed
delete.message: Your account could not be deleted. Please try again later.

network.title: Connection unavailable
network.message: The connection to the server could not be established. Please check your internet connection and try again.

serviceUnavailable.title: Service unavailable
serviceUnavailable.message: The service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

404.title: Page not found
404.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

500.title: Server error
500.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

default.title: Something went wrong
default.message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again.

logout.title: Sign out
logout.description: You are about to end your current session on this device.

warning.title: This will end your session
warning.description: You will be redirected to the login page after signing out.

success.title: Signed out
success.message: You have been signed out successfully.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.termsHint: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service.

register.title: Create an account
register.termsHint: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox!
verifyEmail.message: If an unverified account exists for this email address, a verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerifiedHint: If your account is already verified, you can sign in directly.

success.title: Verification email sent
success.message: If an account exists for this email, a new verification email has been sent.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.message: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.message: Enter a new password for your account.

success.title: Password reset successfully!
success.message: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.

emailSent.title: Reset link sent!
emailSent.message: If an account exists for this email address, a password reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

hero.title: Stop building products nobody wants.
hero.description: Validate your digital business ideas with real data before you invest time and money. Evidara helps you test what actually works - before you build it.

notFound.title: Content not found
notFound.text: The requested content does not exist or is currently unavailable.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: This will permanently delete your account and all ideas. This action cannot be undone.

success.title: Account deleted
success.message: Your account has been permanently removed.

systemInfo.title: System information
systemInfo.description: This page shows the exact deployed build in this environment.

account.title: Account
account.placeholder: Account details and profile settings will be added here.

security.title: Security
security.placeholder: Password change and related security actions will be added here.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.placeholder: Plan status and billing management will be added here.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.placeholder: Account deletion and destructive actions will be added here.

dashboard.title: My Business Ideas
dashboard.description: Manage and review your business ideas in one place.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search ideas by title or description

actionsNotImplemented.title: Action not implemented
actionsNotImplemented.message: This action will be available soon.

error.title: Ideas could not be loaded
error.message: Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: You don't have any ideas yet
empty.description: Create your first business idea so you can manage, search, and refine it from here later on.

table.title: Ideas overview
table.description: All saved business ideas with search and quick actions.

createForm.title: Create new idea
createForm.description: Capture your business idea so you can evaluate and refine it later.
createForm.intro: Keep it concise for now. A clear title and short description are enough to start building on the idea later.

title.label: Title
title.description: A short, clear name for the idea.

description.label: Description
description.description: Optional: briefly outline the value, target audience, or problem.
description.placeholder: Briefly describe the problem, target users, and your proposed solution.

upgradeModal.title: Upgrade to Pro required
upgradeModal.description: On the Free plan, you can create one business idea.
upgradeModal.pitch: With Pro, you can create unlimited business ideas and scale your validation process without limits.

delete.title: Delete business idea
delete.description: Please confirm that you want to permanently delete this idea.
delete.warning: This action removes the business idea and all associated data permanently. It cannot be undone.

success.title: Idea deleted
success.message: The business idea was permanently removed.

upgradePage.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgradePage.description: Soon you will be able to upgrade your plan to Pro here.
upgradePage.wipText: This upgrade page is not implemented yet.

ideaWorkspace.title: Idea Workspace
ideaWorkspace.description: Workspace for the selected business idea.
ideaWorkspace.wipText: This section will be expanded next.
